instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system components modeled within BIM for physical interaction in TwinLight project"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService
]

]

]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables BIMValidationService, ModelDeploymentService
]

instance BIMSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic models enriched with device metadata for sensors and actuators"

]

]
